name: Aleksandr Cherednichenko
previewText: I am a frontend developer with over two years of experience. Two of which are commercial experience working on high-quality and high-load projects. For the past year, I have been mainly working with the Vue 3 framework, a modern and concise framework for creating web interfaces. I have a showcase of amazing web applications that I have built. I am proficient in HTML, SCSS, JavaScript, Vue 3 and other web technologies. I also have a flair for design and base proficiency with graphic design applications (e.g., Figma). I was born in Magnitogorsk, but I moved to Saint Petersburg to pursue my passion in this field. Currently, I am living in Thailand and looking for remote work.
usefulTitle: I can be a valuable asset for potential employers because:

useful.1: A proven track record of delivering high-quality web applications with Vue 3
useful.3: A keen interest in learning new technologies and best practices
useful.4: I have a flexible and adaptive mindset

work1.name: Reelmotion Games
work1.description: A company specializing in the development and implementation of unique b2b solutions for the i-gaming industry

work2.name: AT-Work
work2.description: A company engaged in the development of a service that includes the search and hiring of specialists, the placement of advertisements for the sale of goods, as well as the selection of service providers.

work3.name: Fl.ru
work3.description: Fulfillment of orders from freelance exchanges, development of static pages

project1.name: Post blog Nuxt 3
project1.description: Personal blog app with posts. Implemented creation, deletion, editing posts. Project written using: Nuxt 3, Vite, Pinia

project2.name: Alerts app
project2.description: Test task, it was required to implement navigation, work with api.

project3.name: Template for a personal portfolio site
project3.description: Site - portfolio. The project is written in Vue 3 Composition api, in conjunction with the Vite faucet. Used: EsLint, i18n. The design is taken from the sample layouts that are in the public domain.

project4.name: Integration OpenAI API
project4.description: Integration of the public OpenAI API in a Vue project. This project was conceived for a more accessible understanding and use of AI. Some components and functions, as well as texts used in the project, were generated by AI. The project is currently on hold.

project5.name: Create a letter of recommendation
project5.description: In this project, the functionality of creating a recommendation letter is implemented. The project was written in vanilla JS. During the data entry process, the already filled data is saved.

project6.name: Create a new resume
project6.description: A project to create a new resume for a portal similar to HH. Written using the Sass preprocessor, the main functionality is written in vanilla JS.
